reason: The skill tests recognizing/reciting the list of equivalent statements of the Invertible Matrix Theorem (e.g. 'which of the following is NOT equivalent to A being invertible' or 'which statements are equivalent'), which is a true/false/verdict recognition task over a fixed list of theorem clauses, not a single solver-computable number; any reframing to a concrete det/rank computation collapses into the already-authored invertible_matrix_theorem.json (det/rank decides invertibility), so this skill itself has no distinct code-computable scalar answer.
